results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Operation Shaaban cumulative ~129 militants killed since Jul 5, but casualties are overwhelmingly armed militants in an already-priced counterinsurgency; no dated new state-caused mass-civilian-harm event. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 17.2.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Continued civilian casualties in southern Lebanon are EXTERNALLY-INFLICTED (Israeli strikes), attributed to Israel not Lebanon. Lebanese own-conduct unchanged. No scoreable own-conduct move. CONFIRM 17.2.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Sixth-day Hormuz crisis; Iran reports 30+ civilians killed by US strikes — INTERSTATE/US-attributable, logged for digest, not an Iran own-conduct debit. Own executions/repression already price the near-floor; arithmetic forecloses a move. CONFIRM 2.5 + watch.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: European Parliament voted 476-28 to designate the RSF a terrorist organization over the El Obeid siege — a grave international-accountability escalation. RSF harm is non-state; the state own-conduct record underpins the 0.0 floor, sustained and reinforced.

results.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
results.key_finding: Ebola deaths crossed 754 (Jul 13-14), fastest-growing outbreak on record — but epidemic caseload is disease-attributed, not a discrete new own-conduct failure. Chronic response weakness already priced near-floor. CONFIRM 2.3.

results.name: El Salvador
results.key_finding: SUB-THRESHOLD CONTINUATION. Term-limit amendment + 86 political prisoners already priced into the 15.0 band crossing applied 2026-07-05; same-conduct continuation, not a discrete new >=5pt move. CONFIRM 15.0 + strong downward watch.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Sumy glide-bomb strike Jul 15 killed 5 and injured 30 in a crowded civilian area — a fresh dated own-conduct mass-casualty incident atop June record 293 killed/1,990 injured. Realized own-conduct harm reinforces the 0.0 floor.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Cumulative post-ceasefire Gaza toll rose to 1,123 killed / 3,616 injured with strikes at the highest level since the October truce (3,689 violations logged). Own-conduct strikes sustain and freshly reinforce the 0.0 floor.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: Security Council emergency briefing flags Saudi airstrikes and Iranian aircraft landings (interstate, logged for digest); 73 UN staff remain detained by Houthi authorities amid mass hunger. Internal-actor aid obstruction sustains the 0.0 floor.

results.name: Tunisia
results.key_finding: Ghannouchi "Conspiracy 2" conviction (life + 30 years) SUSTAINS the basis for the 34.4->23.8 downgrade applied 2026-07-14. Same-conduct corroboration, not a new escalation; re-proposing would double-count. CONFIRM 23.8.

results.name: Cuba
results.key_finding: THRESHOLD: SUB-THRESHOLD CONTINUATION. Record 1,306 political prisoners (Jul 9) is a genuine but incremental escalation within an already-priced repression trajectory (ACC/INT 1.5); the third grid collapse is externally-attributed (US oil blockade). Neither is a discrete new own-conduct >=5pt step-change (weaknessFactor 0 -> ~1.6 raw-pt needed). CONFIRM 32.8 + downward watch.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: xAI filed suit Jul 14 against a user over Grok-generated CSAM deepfakes — notable but does not cure the unresolved reporting-failure allegations in the amended class action. Own-product conduct reinforces but cannot lower the 0.0 harm-floor. CONFIRM 0.0.

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Earthquake toll holds at 4,333 (Jul 11), no newer figure; growth is disaster-attributed caseload (natural), not a discrete new own-conduct failure. No dated aid-diversion/responder-denial evidence crossing -5pt. CONFIRM 18.0, strong downward watch.

results.name: China
results.key_finding: Ethnic Unity Law enforcement sustained; a Tibetan activist self-immolated near UN HQ in protest. Sustained/incremental continuation already reflected in ACC 1.0 / INT 1.0. No discrete new >=5pt event. CONFIRM 19.5.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: THRESHOLD: SUB-THRESHOLD CONTINUATION. WFP forced to scale down nutrition programs (300,000+ children) is a donor-funding-driven cut (substantially external), not a discrete new Nigerian own-conduct failure; famine already priced at the 2026-06-19 band crossing. CONFIRM 18.0 + downward watch.

special_attention_determinations.sudan: 0.0 FLOOR CONFIRM/REINFORCED. EU Parliament voted 476-28 to designate the RSF a terrorist organization over the El Obeid siege — a grave escalation in the international response. RSF harm is non-state; the state own-conduct record underpins the floor. At 0.0 the entity cannot move lower. No proposal.
special_attention_determinations.nigeria: THRESHOLD DETERMINATION = SUB-THRESHOLD CONTINUATION. WFP forced to scale down northeast nutrition programs (300,000+ children) is a DONOR-FUNDING-DRIVEN operational cut (substantially external), not a discrete new Nigerian own-conduct failure. The famine was already priced at the 2026-06-19 band crossing (Developing->Critical, 21.9->18.0). Boko Haram farming ban is non-state actor. All 8 dims <4 (weaknessFactor 0) -> a 5pt move needs ~1.6 aggregate raw-pt drop, which a donor-driven external cut does not supply. CONFIRM 18.0 + downward watch. No proposal.
special_attention_determinations.cuba: THRESHOLD DETERMINATION = SUB-THRESHOLD CONTINUATION. Record 1,306 political prisoners (Jul 9, incl 40 minors, 458 medically vulnerable) + 1,949 H1 repressive actions is a GENUINE but INCREMENTAL own-conduct escalation (~100-150 over prior records) within an already-priced repression trajectory (ACC/INT at 1.5); the third grid collapse in nine days is EXTERNALLY-attributed (US oil blockade, per Al Jazeera). Cuba is the highest-scoring entity in the set (32.8) but all 8 dims <4 (weaknessFactor 0) so composite=base; a 5pt move needs ~1.6 aggregate raw-pt drop that an incremental repression rise + external grid failure do not supply. CONFIRM 32.8 + downward watch on the political-prisoner count.
special_attention_determinations.el_salvador: SUB-THRESHOLD CONTINUATION. Term-limit amendment + Cristosal 86 political prisoners already priced into the 15.0 band crossing applied 2026-07-05 (own-conduct). Same-conduct continuation, not a discrete new >=5pt event. Do NOT re-propose. CONFIRM 15.0 + strong downward watch.
special_attention_determinations.iran: Attribution split. 30+ civilians killed this cycle are from US strikes (interstate/US-attributable) and are logged for the digest US-conduct dimension, NOT scored as an Iran own-conduct debit. Iran own executions/repression (784+ YTD) already price the 2.5 near-floor; near-floor arithmetic forecloses a >=5pt move. CONFIRM 2.5 + watch.
special_attention_determinations.russia: 0.0 FLOOR REINFORCED. Sumy glide-bomb strike Jul 15 (5 killed, 30 injured, crowded civilian area) is realized own-conduct mass-casualty harm atop June record 293 killed/1,990 injured. At floor; CONFIRM 0.0.
special_attention_determinations.tunisia: Ghannouchi "Conspiracy 2" life+30yr conviction SUSTAINS the 34.4->23.8 downgrade applied 2026-07-14. Same-conduct corroboration; re-proposing would double-count. CONFIRM 23.8. No proposal.
special_attention_determinations.xai_grok: 0.0 FLOOR CONFIRM. xAI suing its own user over Grok-generated CSAM (Jul 14) is notable but does not cure the unresolved reporting-failure allegations in the amended class action. Own-product conduct reinforces but cannot lower the harm-floor. CONFIRM 0.0.

us_conduct_dimension_for_digest: Iran/Strait of Hormuz crisis: US completed a second strike wave on Iranian assets (Jul 15, incl. 90-min assault on Greater Tunb Island); Iran reported 30+ civilians killed / 260+ injured. Interstate/US-attributable — logged for digest, NOT attributed to Iran compassion score.
Lebanon: Jul 6 Nabatieh drone strike killing 4 civilians is Israeli own-conduct, attributed to Israel — logged against Israel (already at 0.0 floor), not Lebanon.

Yemen: Saudi airstrikes and Iranian aircraft landings (new de-escalation flashpoint per Jul 13 Security Council briefing) are interstate/external vectors — logged for digest, not scored against Yemen own-conduct.

Cuba energy crisis: US oil blockade (imposed after 2026 US intervention in Venezuela) is the proximate external driver of the third grid collapse in nine days — externally-attributed compounding factor, not Cuban own-conduct.
notes: 15 priority entities assessed; 15 confirmations, 0 new change proposals; queue remains clear. Human-approval gate respected — no published index JSON modified, score-updater not run. No dimensions changed for any entity, so no subdim sidecars written this cycle. rotation-state comp/band/rank already mirror the published index for all 15 (no drift; no corrections needed). Dominant pattern: 5 entities at the 0.0 harm-floor (Sudan, Russia, Israel, Yemen, xAI/Grok) reinforced but immovable; 2 near-floor (Iran 2.5, DRC 2.3) where arithmetic forecloses moves; remainder are sub-threshold same-conduct continuations of recently-applied baselines (El Salvador 07-05, Tunisia 07-14, Nigeria 06-19). Correct attribution of externally-inflicted (Israeli strikes on Lebanon), interstate (US strikes on Iran; Saudi/Iran in Yemen), naturally-caused (Venezuela quake, DRC Ebola) and externally-compounded (US blockade on Cuba grid) harm away from entity own-conduct scores. Cuba and Nigeria threshold determinations both resolve SUB-THRESHOLD.
